---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new command for the ddx CLI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: oleg-putseiko
---

<!--
⚠️ NOTICE:

Before submitting a feature request, please search the existing issues to ensure it hasn't been requested or implemented already.
-->

✨ **Feature description**

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to achieve or add to the project (e.g., "Add a new `ddx cache clear` command", "Add an option to bypass prompts in `ddx node pin`"). -->

🎯 **Motivation and use case**

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it useful for internal Dispersia developers and CI/CD pipelines? -->

💡 **Proposed solution**

<!-- A clear and concise description of how you envision this feature working. If you are proposing a new command or flag, please include the desired CLI syntax below. -->

```bash
# Example syntax:
ddx new-command --some-flag value
```

🔄 **Alternatives considered**

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered (e.g., "Currently, I have to write a custom bash script in every project repository instead of using ddx"). -->

➕ **Helpful Links & Additional context**

<!-- Add any other context about the feature request here. If you are proposing a workflow inspired by another CLI tool (like turborepo, nx, etc.), please provide relevant links. -->
